name: HWM_XFR_READY_REC_GRP
description: A new tables is needed in order to store the time card ready to transfer.

columns.Name: XFR_READY_REC_GRP_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key column containing a random generated number.  This column is not updateable.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CALC_REC_GRP_ID
columns.Comments: Id of the calculated time record group (time card GRP_TYPE_ID=200)

columns.Name: CALC_REC_GRP_VERSION
columns.Comments: Version of the calculated time record group

columns.Name: TM_REC_GRP_ID
columns.Comments: Id of the reported time record group (time card  GRP_TYPE_ID=100)

columns.Name: TM_REC_GRP_VERSION
columns.Comments: Version of the reported time record group

columns.Name: START_TIME
columns.Comments: Start time of the time record group

columns.Name: STOP_TIME
columns.Comments: Stop time of the time record group

columns.Name: RESOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: RESOURCE_ID

columns.Name: SUBRESOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: SUBRESOURCE_ID

columns.Name: TCSMRS_ID
columns.Comments: Time consumer id

columns.Name: LDG_OR_BU_ID
columns.Comments: LDG (Payroll) or Business id (Project)

columns.Name: XFR_STATUS
columns.Comments: Status of the record: 1=Pending, 2=Selected, 3=Finish,...

columns.Name: XFR_JOB
columns.Comments: Transfer job associated with the record.

columns.Name: SOURCE
columns.Comments: Indicates which process made the time card transferable. 1 = Approval, 2 Crunch

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: ENTERPRISE_ID

columns.Name: GRP_REC_COUNT
columns.Comments: GRP_REC_COUNT

columns.Name: MARK_FOR_TRANSFER
columns.Comments: Used to mark the row as ready for transfer
